title: selaginella qingchengshanensis
intro: Selaginella qingchengshanensis, also known as the Qingchengshan spikemoss, is a species of plant in the Selaginellaceae family, characterized by its small, spiky leaves and ability to thrive in shaded environments. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Research has shown that Selaginella qingchengshanensis may have various health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting immune function. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into tea or capsule form, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
